---
name: Finding write-up
about: Record a result with its evidence, limitations, and what would strengthen or weaken it.
title: "[finding] "
labels: ["finding"]
---

## Result
<!-- One or two sentences. What did you learn? State it as a claim that can be falsified. -->

## Evidence
<!-- Numbers that back the claim. Include the comparison, not just the treatment. -->

| Variant | Metric | Value | Notes |
|---------|--------|-------|-------|
| baseline |  |  |  |
| treatment |  |  |  |

- Runs / commits:
- Seeds (and whether the result holds across them):

## Limitations
<!-- Where this does NOT hold, confounds, single-seed caveats, CPU-vs-GPU numerics, short-horizon only, etc. -->

## What would strengthen it
<!-- More seeds, longer horizon, a held-out task, an independent metric... -->

## What would weaken / overturn it
<!-- The observation that would make you drop this claim. -->

## Disposition
<!-- Promote to default? Keep as inert note? Needs a follow-up ablation? -->
